description_long: This is a military-style all-terrain vehicle resembling a classic tank, featuring a robust armored hull and a rotating turret with a long barrel cannon. The vehicle is equipped with six large road wheels on each side, supported by continuous tracks for superior off-road mobility. The exterior is finished in a matte olive drab color, with visible rivets and hatches on the turret and hull, suggesting reinforced armor plating. The front of the vehicle is sloped for deflection, while the rear is boxy and flat, likely housing the engine compartment. The turret is centrally mounted and includes a small antenna, indicating possible communication equipment. The overall design is utilitarian, built for durability and performance in rugged environments.
description: A military-style tracked all-terrain vehicle with a rotating turret, armored hull, and six large wheels per side, finished in matte olive drab.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, six large wheels, continuous tracks, and the turret with its long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped armored front, central turret, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the turret, wheels, and tracks.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat back, engine compartment area, and the rear of the turret.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tracks have a blocky, rugged tread pattern designed for maximum traction on rough and uneven terrain, suitable for off-road and urban rubble.
